note: All 9 ACs are tightly coupled — frontmatter, builder, audit, and constitution must land together for any single AC to pass. One scenario + one implement pass.

recipe.name: test_when_every_baseline_SKILL_md_then_owner_field_is_baseline_or_user
recipe.assertion: Every .claude/skills/<slug>/SKILL.md has frontmatter with key `owner` whose value is exactly `baseline` or `user` (unquoted, lowercase).
recipe.fixtures:
Real .claude/skills/ tree (36 SKILL.md files); read with node:fs/promises.readFile; parse frontmatter via regex `^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
`; match line `^owner:\s*(baseline|user)\s*$`.

recipe.name: test_when_clean_build_then_manifest_v2_with_owners_skills
recipe.assertion: After running `npm run build`, obj/template/manifest.json has manifest_version === 2 AND owners.skills is a non-empty object whose values are all the string `baseline`.
recipe.fixtures: execFileSync('bash', ['scripts/build-template.sh']) in a tmp dir clone; assert JSON shape.

recipe.name: test_when_audit_runs_after_clean_build_then_exits_zero
recipe.assertion: `bash .claude/skills/audit-baseline/audit.sh` exits 0 immediately after a clean build of the dev repo.

recipe.name: test_when_baseline_SKILL_md_body_tampered_then_audit_reports_hash_mismatch
recipe.assertion: Mutating one byte in any baseline SKILL.md body (after build, before audit) causes audit exit non-zero with output containing literal `hash mismatch` AND the affected slug name.
recipe.fixtures: tmp clone of repo via cp -r; run build there; appendFile a single space to one SKILL.md body; run audit; assert exit !== 0 and stdout includes 'hash mismatch' + slug.

recipe.name: test_when_user_skill_added_then_audit_ignores_it
recipe.assertion: Adding .claude/skills/user-example/SKILL.md with `owner: user` frontmatter to a tmp clone (post-build) leaves audit exit === 0.
recipe.fixtures: tmp clone; build; create user-example dir with SKILL.md carrying frontmatter `name: user-example\nowner: user\ndescription: test`; run audit; assert exit === 0.

recipe.name: test_when_owner_field_removed_then_audit_reports_missing_owner_frontmatter
recipe.assertion: Removing the `owner:` line from one baseline SKILL.md causes audit exit non-zero with output containing literal `missing owner frontmatter` AND the slug.
recipe.fixtures: tmp clone; build; sed-out the owner line from .claude/skills/spec/SKILL.md; run audit; assert exit !== 0 and message names 'spec'.

recipe.name: test_when_section_17_missing_from_seed_then_audit_reports_missing_citation
recipe.assertion: Removing the §17 paragraph from docs/init/seed.md (post-build) causes audit exit non-zero with output containing `seed.md missing §17 citation` or equivalent.
recipe.fixtures: tmp clone; build; rewrite seed.md without §17; run audit; assert exit !== 0 and message names seed.md missing §17 citation.

recipe.name: test_when_two_consecutive_builds_then_manifests_byte_identical
recipe.assertion: Running build-manifest.mjs twice on identical input produces byte-identical manifest.json (deterministic build).
recipe.fixtures: tmp clone; run scripts/build-template.sh twice; read obj/template/manifest.json after each; assert string equality.

recipe.name: test_when_baseline_skill_directory_removed_then_audit_reports_baseline_skill_missing
recipe.assertion: Removing an entire .claude/skills/<slug>/ directory (post-build, so manifest still lists it) causes audit exit non-zero with output containing `baseline skill missing` AND the slug.
recipe.fixtures: tmp clone; build; rm -rf .claude/skills/spec; run audit; assert exit !== 0 and message names 'spec'.

recipe.name: test_when_manifest_built_then_v2_shape_has_owners_skills_present
recipe.assertion: tests/manifest.test.mjs gains a `manifest v2 shape` describe block that asserts manifest_version is 2 (not 1) and owners.skills is an object with 36 entries all valued `baseline`.
recipe.fixtures: Read obj/template/manifest.json directly from the dev repo (built before test run); assert shape.

recipe.name: test_when_target_has_v2_manifest_then_doctor_tolerates
recipe.assertion: tests/doctor.test.mjs gains a case where the target's .claude/.baseline-manifest.json carries manifest_version: 2 AND an owners field; doctor must run without error.
recipe.fixtures: Existing tests/doctor.test.mjs harness; write a v2 manifest into target tmp; spawn the doctor subcommand; assert clean output.

out_of_scope_scenarios: Per-skill aggregate (merkle) hash — explicitly rejected in spec (per-file map suffices).
doctor surfacing owners.skills to user — deferred to future upgrade subcommand.
Migration script for the 36 SKILL.md files — spec position is manual edits inside this /tdd pass.
Lock-file source-of-truth at src/.claude/baseline.lock.json — spec chose build-output-only.
Cryptographic supply-chain attestation — out of scope per spec non-goals.

behavior_excerpts: spec §Behavior #1 (build path) — manifest.json v2 emitted with sorted owners.skills keys; fails build with exit 1 on missing/invalid owner frontmatter.
spec §Behavior #2 (audit path) — load_manifest, check_skill_ownership (frontmatter + per-file sha256), check_constitutional_citations.
spec §Behavior #3 (install path) — CLI loader treats manifest_version: 2 opaquely; mirrors to target/.claude/.baseline-manifest.json verbatim.

spec Class diagram — Manifest.owners is { skills: Map<slug, 'baseline'|'user'> } (only 'baseline' is emitted by build; 'user' may appear in user-added SKILL.md frontmatter but is not in the manifest).

project_conventions.frontmatter_position: owner: line directly after name: in YAML frontmatter (position 2)
project_conventions.manifest_determinism: sorted keys, two-space indent, trailing newline, JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2) + "\n"
